subject: FlowSchema and PriorityLevelConfiguration API
truth: Stop using flowcontrol.apiserver.k8s.io/v1beta3 for FlowSchema and PriorityLevelConfiguration; use flowcontrol.apiserver.k8s.io/v1 instead.
quote: The flowcontrol.apiserver.k8s.io/v1beta3 API version of FlowSchema and PriorityLevelConfiguration is no longer served as of v1.32.

subject: PriorityLevelConfiguration spec.limited.nominalConcurrencyShares defaulting behaviour
old: nominalConcurrencyShares defaulted to 30 even when explicitly set to 0
new: nominalConcurrencyShares only defaults to 30 when unspecified; explicit 0 stays 0
truth: In flowcontrol.apiserver.k8s.io/v1, PriorityLevelConfiguration spec.limited.nominalConcurrencyShares only defaults to 30 when the field is unspecified; an explicit value of 0 is preserved as 0.
quote: The PriorityLevelConfiguration spec.limited.nominalConcurrencyShares field only defaults to 30 when unspecified, and an explicit value of 0 is not changed to 30.

from_fact: nominalconcurrencyshares defaulted to 30 even when explicitly set to 0
nominalconcurrencyshares only defaults to 30 when unspecified; explicit 0 stays 0

subject: FlowSchema and PriorityLevelConfiguration API
truth: Stop using flowcontrol.apiserver.k8s.io/v1beta2 for FlowSchema and PriorityLevelConfiguration; use flowcontrol.apiserver.k8s.io/v1 or v1beta3 instead.
quote: The flowcontrol.apiserver.k8s.io/v1beta2 API version of FlowSchema and PriorityLevelConfiguration is no longer served as of v1.29.

subject: PriorityLevelConfiguration field
truth: In flowcontrol.apiserver.k8s.io/v1 and v1beta3, PriorityLevelConfiguration spec.limited.assuredConcurrencyShares is renamed to spec.limited.nominalConcurrencyShares.
quote: The PriorityLevelConfiguration spec.limited.assuredConcurrencyShares field is renamed to spec.limited.nominalConcurrencyShares

subject: PriorityLevelConfiguration spec.limited.nominalConcurrencyShares defaulting behaviour (v1)
old: assuredConcurrencyShares defaulted to 30 even when explicitly set to 0
new: nominalConcurrencyShares only defaults to 30 when unspecified; explicit 0 stays 0
truth: In flowcontrol.apiserver.k8s.io/v1, PriorityLevelConfiguration spec.limited.nominalConcurrencyShares only defaults to 30 when unspecified; an explicit value of 0 is preserved as 0.
quote: The PriorityLevelConfiguration spec.limited.nominalConcurrencyShares field only defaults to 30 when unspecified, and an explicit value of 0 is not changed to 30.

from_fact: assuredconcurrencyshares defaulted to 30 even when explicitly set to 0
nominalconcurrencyshares only defaults to 30 when unspecified; explicit 0 stays 0

subject: CSIStorageCapacity API
truth: Stop using storage.k8s.io/v1beta1 for CSIStorageCapacity; use storage.k8s.io/v1 instead.
quote: The storage.k8s.io/v1beta1 API version of CSIStorageCapacity is no longer served as of v1.27.

subject: FlowSchema and PriorityLevelConfiguration API
truth: Stop using flowcontrol.apiserver.k8s.io/v1beta1 for FlowSchema and PriorityLevelConfiguration; use flowcontrol.apiserver.k8s.io/v1beta2 instead.
quote: The flowcontrol.apiserver.k8s.io/v1beta1 API version of FlowSchema and PriorityLevelConfiguration is no longer served as of v1.26.

subject: HorizontalPodAutoscaler API
truth: Stop using autoscaling/v2beta2 for HorizontalPodAutoscaler; use autoscaling/v2 instead.
quote: The autoscaling/v2beta2 API version of HorizontalPodAutoscaler is no longer served as of v1.26.

subject: HorizontalPodAutoscaler targetAverageUtilization
truth: Stop using targetAverageUtilization; use target.averageUtilization and set target.type to Utilization instead.
quote: `targetAverageUtilization` is replaced with `target.averageUtilization` and `target.type: Utilization`.

subject: CronJob batch/v1beta1 API
truth: Stop using batch/v1beta1 for CronJob; use batch/v1 instead.
quote: The **batch/v1beta1** API version of CronJob is no longer served as of v1.25.

subject: EndpointSlice discovery.k8s.io/v1beta1 API
truth: Stop using discovery.k8s.io/v1beta1 for EndpointSlice; use discovery.k8s.io/v1 instead.
quote: The **discovery.k8s.io/v1beta1** API version of EndpointSlice is no longer served as of v1.25.

subject: EndpointSlice topology field
truth: Stop using topology["kubernetes.io/hostname"] on EndpointSlice; use the per-Endpoint nodeName field instead.
quote: use per Endpoint `nodeName` field instead of deprecated `topology["kubernetes.io/hostname"]` field

subject: EndpointSlice topology zone field
truth: Stop using topology["topology.kubernetes.io/zone"] on EndpointSlice; use the per-Endpoint zone field instead.
quote: use per Endpoint `zone` field instead of deprecated `topology["topology.kubernetes.io/zone"]` field

subject: EndpointSlice topology field (general)
truth: Stop using the topology field on EndpointSlice; it is replaced with deprecatedTopology which is not writable in v1.
quote: `topology` is replaced with the `deprecatedTopology` field which is not writable in v1

subject: Event events.k8s.io/v1beta1 API
truth: Stop using events.k8s.io/v1beta1 for Event; use events.k8s.io/v1 instead.
quote: The **events.k8s.io/v1beta1** API version of Event is no longer served as of v1.25.

subject: Event type field
new: type limited to Normal and Warning
truth: The Event type field is now limited to only 'Normal' and 'Warning'; other values will be rejected.
quote: `type` is limited to `Normal` and `Warning`

from_fact: type limited to normal and warning

subject: Event involvedObject field
truth: Stop using involvedObject on Event; use the regarding field instead.
quote: `involvedObject` is renamed to `regarding`

subject: Event required fields
truth: The action, reason, reportingController, and reportingInstance fields are now required when creating new events.k8s.io/v1 Events.
quote: `action`, `reason`, `reportingController`, and `reportingInstance` are required when creating new **events.k8s.io/v1** Events

subject: Event firstTimestamp field
truth: Stop using firstTimestamp on Event; use eventTime instead. firstTimestamp is renamed to deprecatedFirstTimestamp and not permitted in new Events.
quote: use `eventTime` instead of the deprecated `firstTimestamp` field (which is renamed to `deprecatedFirstTimestamp` and not permitted in new **events.k8s.io/v1** Events)

subject: Event lastTimestamp field
truth: Stop using lastTimestamp on Event; use series.lastObservedTime instead. lastTimestamp is renamed to deprecatedLastTimestamp and not permitted in new Events.
quote: use `series.lastObservedTime` instead of the deprecated `lastTimestamp` field (which is renamed to `deprecatedLastTimestamp` and not permitted in new **events.k8s.io/v1** Events)

subject: Event count field
truth: Stop using count on Event; use series.count instead. count is renamed to deprecatedCount and not permitted in new Events.
quote: use `series.count` instead of the deprecated `count` field (which is renamed to `deprecatedCount` and not permitted in new **events.k8s.io/v1** Events)

subject: Event source.component field
truth: Stop using source.component on Event; use reportingController instead. source.component is renamed to deprecatedSource.component and not permitted in new Events.
quote: use `reportingController` instead of the deprecated `source.component` field (which is renamed to `deprecatedSource.component` and not permitted in new **events.k8s.io/v1** Events)

subject: Event source.host field
truth: Stop using source.host on Event; use reportingInstance instead. source.host is renamed to deprecatedSource.host and not permitted in new Events.
quote: use `reportingInstance` instead of the deprecated `source.host` field (which is renamed to `deprecatedSource.host` and not permitted in new **events.k8s.io/v1** Events)

subject: HorizontalPodAutoscaler autoscaling/v2beta1 API
truth: Stop using autoscaling/v2beta1 for HorizontalPodAutoscaler; use autoscaling/v2 instead.
quote: The **autoscaling/v2beta1** API version of HorizontalPodAutoscaler is no longer served as of v1.25.

subject: autoscaling API version
new: autoscaling/v2 with target.averageUtilization and target.type: Utilization
truth: Stop using targetAverageUtilization; use target.averageUtilization with target.type: Utilization in autoscaling/v2.
quote: `targetAverageUtilization` is replaced with `target.averageUtilization` and `target.type: Utilization`.

from_fact: autoscaling/v2 with target.averageutilization and target.type: utilization

subject: PodDisruptionBudget API version
truth: Stop using policy/v1beta1 for PodDisruptionBudget; use policy/v1 instead.
quote: The **policy/v1beta1** API version of PodDisruptionBudget is no longer served as of v1.25.

subject: PodDisruptionBudget empty spec.selector behaviour
old: empty spec.selector ({}) in policy/v1beta1 selected no pods
new: empty spec.selector ({}) in policy/v1 selects all pods in the namespace
truth: An empty spec.selector ({}) in policy/v1 PodDisruptionBudget now selects all pods instead of no pods.
quote: an empty `spec.selector` (`{}`) written to a `policy/v1` PodDisruptionBudget selects all pods in the namespace (in `policy/v1beta1` an empty `spec.selector` selected no pods).

from_fact: empty spec.selector ({}) in policy/v1beta1 selected no pods
empty spec.selector ({}) in policy/v1 selects all pods in the namespace

subject: PodSecurityPolicy API version
truth: Stop using policy/v1beta1 PodSecurityPolicy; migrate to Pod Security Admission or a 3rd party admission webhook.
quote: PodSecurityPolicy in the **policy/v1beta1** API version is no longer served as of v1.25, and the PodSecurityPolicy admission controller will be removed.

subject: RuntimeClass API version
truth: Stop using node.k8s.io/v1beta1 for RuntimeClass; use node.k8s.io/v1 instead.
quote: RuntimeClass in the **node.k8s.io/v1beta1** API version is no longer served as of v1.25.

subject: Webhook resources API version
truth: Stop using admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1beta1 for MutatingWebhookConfiguration and ValidatingWebhookConfiguration; use admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1 instead.
quote: The **admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1beta1** API version of MutatingWebhookConfiguration and ValidatingWebhookConfiguration is no longer served as of v1.22.

subject: Webhook failurePolicy default
old: default failurePolicy was Ignore in v1beta1
new: default failurePolicy is Fail in v1
truth: The default failurePolicy for webhooks changed from Ignore to Fail in admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1.
quote: `webhooks[*].failurePolicy` default changed from `Ignore` to `Fail` for v1

from_fact: default failurepolicy was ignore in v1beta1
default failurepolicy is fail in v1

subject: Webhook matchPolicy default
old: default matchPolicy was Exact in v1beta1
new: default matchPolicy is Equivalent in v1
truth: The default matchPolicy for webhooks changed from Exact to Equivalent in admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1.
quote: `webhooks[*].matchPolicy` default changed from `Exact` to `Equivalent` for v1

from_fact: default matchpolicy was exact in v1beta1
default matchpolicy is equivalent in v1

subject: Webhook timeoutSeconds default
truth: The default timeoutSeconds for webhooks changed from 30s to 10s in admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1.
quote: `webhooks[*].timeoutSeconds` default changed from `30s` to `10s` for v1

subject: Webhook sideEffects field
old: sideEffects had a default value in v1beta1
new: sideEffects has no default, is required, and only None and NoneOnDryRun are permitted in v1
truth: The sideEffects field is now required with no default, and only None and NoneOnDryRun are permitted in admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1.
quote: `webhooks[*].sideEffects` default value is removed, and the field made required, and only `None` and `NoneOnDryRun` are permitted for v1

from_fact: sideeffects had a default value in v1beta1
sideeffects has no default, is required, and only none and noneondryrun are permitted in v1

subject: Webhook admissionReviewVersions field
old: admissionReviewVersions had a default value in v1beta1
new: admissionReviewVersions has no default and is required in v1
truth: The admissionReviewVersions field is now required with no default in admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1.
quote: `webhooks[*].admissionReviewVersions` default value is removed and the field made required for v1

from_fact: admissionreviewversions had a default value in v1beta1
admissionreviewversions has no default and is required in v1

subject: Webhook name uniqueness
old: webhook names did not need to be unique in v1beta1
new: webhook names must be unique in the list in v1
truth: Webhook names must be unique in the list for objects created via admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1.
quote: `webhooks[*].name` must be unique in the list for objects created via `admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1`

from_fact: webhook names did not need to be unique in v1beta1
webhook names must be unique in the list in v1

subject: CustomResourceDefinition API version
truth: Stop using apiextensions.k8s.io/v1beta1 for CustomResourceDefinition; use apiextensions.k8s.io/v1 instead.
quote: The **apiextensions.k8s.io/v1beta1** API version of CustomResourceDefinition is no longer served as of v1.22.

subject: apiextensions.k8s.io API version
truth: Stop using apiextensions.k8s.io/v1beta1 and migrate to apiextensions.k8s.io/v1.
quote: Migrate manifests and API clients to use the **apiextensions.k8s.io/v1** API version, available since v1.16.

subject: spec.scope defaulting
truth: spec.scope is no longer defaulted to Namespaced and must be explicitly specified in v1.
quote: `spec.scope` is no longer defaulted to `Namespaced` and must be explicitly specified

subject: spec.version
truth: spec.version is removed in v1; use spec.versions instead.
quote: `spec.version` is removed in v1; use `spec.versions` instead

subject: spec.validation
truth: spec.validation is removed in v1; use spec.versions[*].schema instead.
quote: `spec.validation` is removed in v1; use `spec.versions[*].schema` instead

subject: spec.subresources
truth: spec.subresources is removed in v1; use spec.versions[*].subresources instead.
quote: `spec.subresources` is removed in v1; use `spec.versions[*].subresources` instead

subject: spec.additionalPrinterColumns
truth: spec.additionalPrinterColumns is removed in v1; use spec.versions[*].additionalPrinterColumns instead.
quote: `spec.additionalPrinterColumns` is removed in v1; use `spec.versions[*].additionalPrinterColumns` instead

subject: spec.conversion.webhookClientConfig
truth: spec.conversion.webhookClientConfig is moved to spec.conversion.webhook.clientConfig in v1.
quote: `spec.conversion.webhookClientConfig` is moved to `spec.conversion.webhook.clientConfig` in v1

subject: spec.conversion.conversionReviewVersions
truth: spec.conversion.conversionReviewVersions is moved to spec.conversion.webhook.conversionReviewVersions in v1.
quote: `spec.conversion.conversionReviewVersions` is moved to `spec.conversion.webhook.conversionReviewVersions` in v1

subject: spec.versions[*].schema.openAPIV3Schema requirement
new: spec.versions[*].schema.openAPIV3Schema is now required and must be structural
truth: spec.versions[*].schema.openAPIV3Schema is now required when creating v1 CRD objects and must be a structural schema.
quote: `spec.versions[*].schema.openAPIV3Schema` is now required when creating v1 CustomResourceDefinition objects, and must be a [structural schema](/docs/tasks/extend-kubernetes/custom-resources/custom-resource-definitions/#specifying-a-structural-schema)

from_fact: spec.versions[*].schema.openapiv3schema is now required and must be structural

subject: spec.preserveUnknownFields
truth: spec.preserveUnknownFields: true is disallowed in v1 CRD; use x-kubernetes-preserve-unknown-fields: true within schema definitions instead.
quote: `spec.preserveUnknownFields: true` is disallowed when creating v1 CustomResourceDefinition objects; it must be specified within schema definitions as `x-kubernetes-preserve-unknown-fields: true`

subject: JSONPath field in additionalPrinterColumns
truth: In additionalPrinterColumns items, the JSONPath field was renamed to jsonPath in v1.
quote: In `additionalPrinterColumns` items, the `JSONPath` field was renamed to `jsonPath` in v1

subject: apiregistration.k8s.io/v1beta1 APIService
truth: The apiregistration.k8s.io/v1beta1 API version of APIService is no longer served as of v1.22; migrate to apiregistration.k8s.io/v1.
quote: The **apiregistration.k8s.io/v1beta1** API version of APIService is no longer served as of v1.22.

subject: authentication.k8s.io/v1beta1 TokenReview
truth: The authentication.k8s.io/v1beta1 API version of TokenReview is no longer served as of v1.22; migrate to authentication.k8s.io/v1.
quote: The **authentication.k8s.io/v1beta1** API version of TokenReview is no longer served as of v1.22.

subject: authorization.k8s.io/v1beta1 SubjectAccessReview resources
truth: The authorization.k8s.io/v1beta1 API version of LocalSubjectAccessReview, SelfSubjectAccessReview, SubjectAccessReview, and SelfSubjectRulesReview is no longer served as of v1.22; migrate to authorization.k8s.io/v1.
quote: The **authorization.k8s.io/v1beta1** API version of LocalSubjectAccessReview, SelfSubjectAccessReview, SubjectAccessReview, and SelfSubjectRulesReview is no longer served as of v1.22.

subject: spec.group in SubjectAccessReview
truth: In authorization.k8s.io/v1, spec.group was renamed to spec.groups.
quote: `spec.group` was renamed to `spec.groups` in v1 (fixes [#32709](https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/32709))

subject: certificates.k8s.io/v1beta1 CertificateSigningRequest
truth: The certificates.k8s.io/v1beta1 API version of CertificateSigningRequest is no longer served as of v1.22; migrate to certificates.k8s.io/v1.
quote: The **certificates.k8s.io/v1beta1** API version of CertificateSigningRequest is no longer served as of v1.22.

subject: certificates.k8s.io API version
truth: Stop using certificates.k8s.io/v1beta1 and migrate to certificates.k8s.io/v1.
quote: Migrate manifests and API clients to use the **certificates.k8s.io/v1** API version, available since v1.19.

subject: spec.signerName in CertificateSigningRequest
truth: Stop omitting spec.signerName in CertificateSigningRequest; it is now required and requests for kubernetes.io/legacy-unknown are not allowed via v1 API.
quote: spec.signerName is now required (see [known Kubernetes signers](/docs/reference/access-authn-authz/certificate-signing-requests/#kubernetes-signers)), and requests for `kubernetes.io/legacy-unknown` are not allowed to be created via the `certificates.k8s.io/v1` API

subject: spec.usages in CertificateSigningRequest
old: spec.usages was optional, allowed duplicates, allowed unknown values
new: spec.usages is now required, must not contain duplicates, and must only contain known usages
truth: Stop omitting spec.usages or passing duplicate/unknown usages in CertificateSigningRequest; spec.usages is now required, must be unique, and must only contain known usages.
quote: spec.usages is now required, may not contain duplicate values, and must only contain known usages

from_fact: spec.usages was optional, allowed duplicates, allowed unknown values
spec.usages is now required, must not contain duplicates, and must only contain known usages

subject: status.conditions in CertificateSigningRequest
new: status.conditions may not contain duplicate types
truth: Stop writing duplicate condition types in status.conditions of CertificateSigningRequest; duplicate types are now rejected.
quote: status.conditions may not contain duplicate types

from_fact: status.conditions may not contain duplicate types

subject: status.conditions[*].status in CertificateSigningRequest
truth: Stop omitting status.conditions[*].status in CertificateSigningRequest; it is now required.
quote: status.conditions[*].status is now required

subject: status.certificate in CertificateSigningRequest
new: status.certificate must be PEM-encoded and contain only CERTIFICATE blocks
truth: Stop writing non-PEM or multi-block PEM data to status.certificate; it must be PEM-encoded with only CERTIFICATE blocks.
quote: status.certificate must be PEM-encoded, and contain only `CERTIFICATE` blocks

from_fact: status.certificate must be pem-encoded and contain only certificate blocks

subject: coordination.k8s.io/v1beta1 Lease API
truth: Stop using coordination.k8s.io/v1beta1 for Lease; it is no longer served as of v1.22. Use coordination.k8s.io/v1 instead.
quote: The **coordination.k8s.io/v1beta1** API version of Lease is no longer served as of v1.22.

subject: extensions/v1beta1 and networking.k8s.io/v1beta1 Ingress API
truth: Stop using extensions/v1beta1 and networking.k8s.io/v1beta1 for Ingress; they are no longer served as of v1.22. Use networking.k8s.io/v1 instead.
quote: The **extensions/v1beta1** and **networking.k8s.io/v1beta1** API versions of Ingress is no longer served as of v1.22.

subject: Ingress spec.backend
truth: Stop using spec.backend in Ingress; it is renamed to spec.defaultBackend.
quote: spec.backend is renamed to spec.defaultBackend

subject: Ingress backend serviceName
truth: Stop using serviceName in Ingress backend; it is renamed to service.name.
quote: The backend `serviceName` field is renamed to `service.name`

subject: Ingress numeric backend servicePort
truth: Stop using numeric servicePort in Ingress backend; it is renamed to service.port.number.
quote: Numeric backend `servicePort` fields are renamed to `service.port.number`

subject: Ingress string backend servicePort
truth: Stop using string servicePort in Ingress backend; it is renamed to service.port.name.
quote: String backend `servicePort` fields are renamed to `service.port.name`

subject: Ingress pathType
new: pathType is now required for each specified path
truth: Stop omitting pathType in Ingress path rules; it is now required. Use ImplementationSpecific to match old v1beta1 behavior.
quote: pathType is now required for each specified path. Options are `Prefix`, `Exact`, and `ImplementationSpecific`. To match the undefined `v1beta1` behavior, use `ImplementationSpecific`.

from_fact: pathtype is now required for each specified path

subject: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1 IngressClass API
truth: Stop using networking.k8s.io/v1beta1 for IngressClass; it is no longer served as of v1.22. Use networking.k8s.io/v1 instead.
quote: The **networking.k8s.io/v1beta1** API version of IngressClass is no longer served as of v1.22.

truth: Stop using rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1beta1 for ClusterRole, ClusterRoleBinding, Role, and RoleBinding; it is no longer served as of v1.22. Use rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1 instead.
quote: The **rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1beta1** API version of ClusterRole, ClusterRoleBinding, Role, and RoleBinding is no longer served as of v1.22.

subject: scheduling.k8s.io/v1beta1 PriorityClass API
truth: Stop using scheduling.k8s.io/v1beta1 for PriorityClass; it is no longer served as of v1.22. Use scheduling.k8s.io/v1 instead.
quote: The **scheduling.k8s.io/v1beta1** API version of PriorityClass is no longer served as of v1.22.

subject: storage.k8s.io/v1beta1 storage resources API
truth: Stop using storage.k8s.io/v1beta1 for CSIDriver, CSINode, StorageClass, and VolumeAttachment; it is no longer served as of v1.22. Use storage.k8s.io/v1 instead.
quote: The **storage.k8s.io/v1beta1** API version of CSIDriver, CSINode, StorageClass, and VolumeAttachment is no longer served as of v1.22.

subject: NetworkPolicy API version
truth: Stop using extensions/v1beta1 for NetworkPolicy; use networking.k8s.io/v1 instead.
quote: The extensions/v1beta1 API version of NetworkPolicy is no longer served as of v1.16.

associative: which api version for network policy

subject: DaemonSet API version
truth: Stop using extensions/v1beta1 or apps/v1beta2 for DaemonSet; use apps/v1 instead.
quote: The extensions/v1beta1 and apps/v1beta2 API versions of DaemonSet are no longer served as of v1.16.

subject: DaemonSet spec.templateGeneration
truth: Stop using spec.templateGeneration on DaemonSet; it has been removed in apps/v1.
quote: spec.templateGeneration is removed

subject: DaemonSet spec.selector
new: spec.selector is required and immutable after creation
truth: DaemonSet spec.selector is now required and immutable after creation; use existing template labels as the selector.

new: spec.selector is required and immutable after creation

truth: Stop using the extensions/v1beta1 API version of PodSecurityPolicy and migrate to policy/v1beta1.

subject: PodSecurityPolicy API version
truth: Replace extensions/v1beta1 with policy/v1beta1 for PodSecurityPolicy in manifests and API clients.
quote: Migrate manifests and API client to use the **policy/v1beta1** API version, available since v1.10.
